## Collections.AggregatedResultMap.getOrAdd() method

Gets an existing item or adds a new one.

**Signature:**

```typescript
getOrAdd(key: TCOMPOSITEID, value: TITEM): DetailedResult<TITEM, ResultMapResultDetail>;
```
